text.title: Stripe Payment Links No Backend Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for emitting a validated payment-links-spec from a catalog YAML.

section.title: Procedure
section.p: Step 1 — Parse catalog. Load `templates/catalog.yaml`, validate every row carries sku/price_cents/currency/fulfill_action. Reject rows with placeholder TODOs.

Step 2 — Run the decision tree. For each SKU compute drivers: billing_model, custom_amount_per_buyer, connect_required. Walk `content/06-decision-tree.xml`. Per branch leaf, pick one of: payment-link, checkout-session, reject-connect.
Step 3 — Generate Stripe links (manually in dashboard, or via Stripe CLI in CI). Record each URL with its sku → URL mapping into `decision.links`.

Step 4 — Wire webhook fanout. Choose signature_strategy: hmac-sha256-stripe-sdk (preferred — uses Stripe Python/Node lib) OR hmac-sha256-manual (Zapier Code step). Pin idempotency_store URL. List fulfillment_channels.

Step 5 — Validate + publish. Run `scripts/validate-stripe-payment-links-no-backend.py spec.json`. On exit 0, commit spec + zapier-blueprint.json. Tag the named owner for human review per the human-checkpoint section.
